task_completion.description: Agent reads the engineering specification document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of /home/ga/Desktop/airfish_wig_spec.txt.
OpenVSP workspace showing a fuselage component in the geometry browser and 3D view.

task_completion.description: Agent creates a Main Wing with a downward-pointing outboard section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: OpenVSP workspace showing a wing component with its outboard section pointing straight down (endplate) in the 3D view, or the wing parameter window showing a dihedral of -90 degrees.

task_completion.description: Agent creates a Vertical Tail with planar symmetry disabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: OpenVSP workspace showing a vertical tail component with only one vertical surface (not mirrored) in the 3D view, or the 'Sym' (planar symmetry) checkbox unchecked in the component window.

task_completion.description: Agent creates a Horizontal Tail elevated to form a T-tail.
task_completion.visual_evidence: OpenVSP workspace showing a horizontal tail component positioned at the top of the vertical tail in the 3D view, or the XForm Z-location parameter set to >= 3.5.

task_completion.description: Agent saves the final model to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: OpenVSP save dialog or a file manager/terminal showing 'wig_concept.vsp3' saved in the /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/ directory.

integrity.description: Agent used the OpenVSP GUI to build the model.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the OpenVSP application open with the agent interacting with its menus, geometry browser, and parameter windows.

integrity.description: Agent did not bypass the software by creating a dummy file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The file wig_concept.vsp3 is saved via OpenVSP's save functionality, not by writing text into a file named wig_concept.vsp3 using a text editor or echo command.

integrity.description: Agent built the model from scratch as requested.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the progressive addition of components (fuselage, wings, tails) rather than just opening a pre-existing complete model.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output path is /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/wig_concept.vsp3. The target endplate dihedral for the main wing is -90.0 degrees. The target T-Tail Z-location minimum is 3.5 meters.
